title: HuaZhou : Chinese Armor
body:
For a long time, I haven't been able to find a Minecraft mod that accurately recreates **historical Chinese ancient armor**. Most mods either lean towards fantasy-style Chinese armor or are completely Western-style armor. **This mod will fill that gap**, presenting you with **authentic Chinese ancient armor**. 

In the update plan, I will start from the **Qin Dynasty** and create famous armor from each period all the way to the last Chinese dynasty: **the Qing Dynasty**. I might also make armor from the dynasties before Qin, namely **Xia, Shang, and Zhou**, but that will probably be much later. 

Anyway, **I hope you enjoy this mod and share it with your friends!**

![huazhou](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f796fd87a47def00359f47413a8e9531e4865ce.jpeg)
